title: refine dangling checks
body:
By proxy by vendoring containers/common. Previously, a "dangling" image
was an untagged image; just a described in the Docker docs. The
definition of dangling has now been refined to an untagged image without
children to be compatible with Docker.

Further update a redundant image-prune test.

Fixes: #10998
Fixes: #10832
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Does `podman images --filter dangling=true` work appropriately with these changes?

Also the man page for `podman rmi` defines an untagged image as a dangling one, does that man page need changing?

> Does `podman images --filter dangling=true` work appropriately with these changes?

Yes.

> Also the man page for `podman rmi` defines an untagged image as a dangling one, does that man page need changing?

Good catch, thanks!  Fixed :+1:
